checks_run.check: Catching any fish triggers a screen shake and a distinct audio ping/jingle.
Catching a high-weight/trophy fish displays a gold 'Trophy Caught!' popup with its emoji and weight.
The trophy popup correctly dismisses itself after 5 seconds automatically.
Screen shake effect decays smoothly (0.9 multiplier) without sudden jumps.
All new states (shake, trophyCatch) are strictly typed and properly initialized in stateRef/useState.
